description_long: This is a large, cubic wooden storage box with reinforced light wood framing and dark wood planks forming the main panels. The top features a diagonal plank pattern, suggesting structural reinforcement. One side displays a prominent black warning symbol with an exclamation mark, indicating caution or special handling. The wood surface shows natural grain, some scratches, and minor stains, giving it a rugged, well-used appearance. The box appears solid and heavy, suitable for storing or transporting goods in urban environments such as warehouses, garages, or construction sites. There are no visible handles, locks, or hinges, and the box is fully enclosed.
description: A large, rugged wooden storage box with reinforced framing and a warning symbol on one side. The surface is worn and stained, suggesting heavy use.
description_view_0: This view shows the front of the box with a large black warning symbol on the wooden panel.
description_view_1: This side displays a plain wooden panel with visible grain and no markings or symbols.
description_view_2: This view reveals a mostly clean wooden panel with a faint handprint stain near the lower right.
description_view_3: This side features a wooden panel with visible scratches and scuffs, but no symbols or stains.
